documents.title: GRC Professional Workday Analysis — June 16 OSINT Sweep
documents.executiveSummary: Ironintel and Ironwatch live OSINT for June 16, 2026 confirms CISA BOD 26-04 (issued June 10) is reshaping federal and private-sector patch SLAs with three-day remediation for KEV-listed, publicly exposed, auto-exploitable flaws — first applied to Ivanti Sentry CVE-2026-10520 (CVSS 10.0). Perimeter KEV chains (Check Point CVE-2026-50751, Cisco SD-WAN CVE-2026-20245/CVE-2026-20262, Oracle PeopleSoft CVE-2026-35273) remain dominant initial-access vectors while DragonForce Backdoor.Turn (disclosed June 16) weaponizes Microsoft Teams TURN relays for stealth C2. CMMC Phase 2 C3PAO Level 2 certification becomes mandatory November 10, 2026; assessments remain locked to NIST SP 800-171 Revision 2 per DoD class deviation 2024-O0013.
keyFindings: CISA BOD 26-04 (June 10, 2026): risk-based vulnerability management replaces flat CVSS deadlines — four-variable matrix (asset exposure, KEV status, exploit automation, technical impact) yields 3-, 14-, or 60-day remediation tiers; federal agencies must perform forensic triage before patch on KEV-listed publicly exposed assets.

CVE-2026-10520 (CVSS 10.0): Ivanti Sentry unauthenticated OS command injection added to KEV June 11; Shadowserver confirmed active exploitation within 40 hours of PoC — first real-world BOD 26-04 three-day mandate with June 14 remediation deadline for FCEB agencies.

CVE-2026-50751 (CVSS 9.3): Check Point Remote Access VPN IKEv1 authentication bypass actively exploited since May 7, 2026 by Qilin ransomware affiliates; exploitation spiked early June — defenders must assume breach on unpatched gateways and hunt lateral movement.

CISA KEV June 9 cluster: CVE-2026-20245 (Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager command execution), CVE-2026-11645 (Google Chromium V8 OOB read/write), CVE-2026-7473 (Arista EOS incomplete comparison) — span network management, browser, and NOS layers requiring tiered response paths under BOD 26-04.

CVE-2026-35273 (CVSS 9.8): Oracle PeopleSoft Environment Management Hub missing authentication added to KEV June 12; ShinyHunters UNC6240 zero-day campaign May 27 through June 9 notified 100 plus orgs, 68 percent higher-education.

DragonForce Backdoor.Turn (Symantec/Carbon Black June 16, 2026): first in-the-wild malware abusing Microsoft Teams TURN relay infrastructure for QUIC C2 — defenders see only legitimate Teams outbound traffic; Technology and Finance profiles must extend SaaS allowlist review beyond domain blocklists.

CVE-2026-20262: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager path traversal enabling authenticated remote arbitrary file write exploited in the wild — network management plane compromise chains to root privilege escalation.

CMMC Phase 2 (November 10, 2026): mandatory Level 2 C3PAO third-party certification for applicable CUI contracts; C3PAO scheduling lead times 4 to 10 weeks — June 2026 is last credible month to begin gap remediation from scratch.

Regulatory lock: DoD class deviation 2024-O0013 holds DFARS 7012 and CMMC Level 2 on NIST SP 800-171 Rev 2 only; DoD published Rev 3 ODP values April 2025 signaling H2 2027 earliest formal transition with 12-to-18-month notice period.

Ironintel correlation priority: BOD 26-04 tier scoring on all KEV entries, IKEv1 VPN deprecation, Teams TURN egress monitoring, PeopleSoft PSEMHUB exposure review, Irongate DMZ validation before any external research enters tenant CRM.

industryProfiles.narrativeSummary: Finance GRC faces BOD 26-04-aligned three-day patch mandates on KEV-listed perimeter assets while DragonForce Backdoor.Turn invalidates Microsoft Teams domain allowlisting as sole SaaS control; board packets must cite BIGINT-cent ALE without float drift and treat IKEv1 VPN and Ivanti Sentry endpoints as potentially breached.

June 16, 2026 healthcare OSINT: PeopleSoft zero-day wave and Ivanti Sentry KEV extend HIPAA OCR notification scope to ERP and mobile-access gateway vendors; MFA on non-EHR admin planes and BOD 26-04 forensic triage before patch are continuous-audit CRITICAL.

Chromium V8 KEV (CVE-2026-11645), Teams TURN C2 abuse, and Arista EOS KEV outpace manual control mapping; Technology sector buyers demand agent-orchestrated evidence vaults with Irongate-sanitized OSINT ingress and browser plus network-OS patch orchestration at BOD 26-04 velocity.

CMMC Level 2 C3PAO requirements phase into DoD contracts November 10, 2026 while assessments remain on NIST 800-171 Rev 2; Defense contractors must align SSP, SPRS, and POA&M with BOD 26-04 forensic triage expectations and engage C3PAO this week to meet Q4 award timelines.

FCEB agencies now operate under BOD 26-04 three-day KEV remediation with mandatory forensic triage; higher-education PeopleSoft zero-day wave (68 percent of notified orgs) and Rev 2 versus Rev 3 divergence require FedRAMP and CMMC-adjacent CUI evidence harmonization.

documents.title: SaaS Disruption Memorandum — BOD 26-04 and Teams TURN C2 Wave
documents.executiveSummary: June 16, 2026 OSINT confirms CISA BOD 26-04 collapses patch windows to three days for highest-risk KEV flaws while DragonForce Backdoor.Turn demonstrates trusted-SaaS relay abuse that evades domain-centric controls. Seat-based GRC SaaS incumbents cannot absorb forensic-triage-before-patch workflows or Teams TURN egress attestation; sovereign control planes with Irongate ingress and integer-cent registers win procurement.
keyFindings: BOD 26-04 (June 10, 2026) four-variable risk matrix is already de facto private-sector standard — Ivanti Sentry CVE-2026-10520 first application proves three-day remediation plus forensic triage is operational reality.

DragonForce Backdoor.Turn (June 16 disclosure) weaponizes Microsoft Teams TURN relays — SaaS allowlist policies that trust *.relay.teams.microsoft.com without session inspection are structurally insufficient.
Check Point CVE-2026-50751 and Cisco SD-WAN KEV cluster confirm edge-appliance and network-management exploitation outpaces quarterly patch cadence.
Board directors require LP-10 config churn and LP-16 meta-audit visibility with Ironscribe export hashes before renewing fragmented GRC SaaS stacks.
Flat annual platform fees in whole-cent BIGINT displace per-seat models when agentic workforce scales OSINT-to-board-report pipelines at BOD 26-04 velocity.

industryProfiles.narrativeSummary: Incumbent SaaS renewals face scrutiny when Ironframe demonstrates BOD 26-04 tier scoring, deterministic board-report ALE, and Irongate-sanitized OSINT without spreadsheet exports; Teams TURN C2 is board-level.
Fastest SaaS disruption velocity; Chromium KEV, Teams TURN abuse, and Arista EOS KEV demand agentic GRC to replace manual Jira-to-audit bridges while patching at BOD 26-04 orchestration speed.

ragChunks.text: Ironintel policy monitor 2026-06-16: CISA BOD 26-04 issued June 10, 2026 replaces CVSS-only deadlines with four-variable risk matrix (asset exposure, KEV status, exploit automation, technical impact). Highest tier: 3-day remediation plus forensic triage on publicly exposed KEV flaws granting total post-exploitation control. First application: CVE-2026-10520 Ivanti Sentry (June 11 KEV, June 14 FCEB deadline). Public Sector and Defense Industry Profiles must align POA&M and SSP with triage-before-patch workflow.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — Check Point VPN CVE-2026-50751
ragChunks.text: Ironintel OSINT 2026-06-16: CVE-2026-50751 (CVSS 9.3) IKEv1 authentication bypass exploited since May 7, 2026 by Qilin affiliates; CISA KEV June 8 with June 11 remediation deadline passed — assume breach on unpatched Check Point Remote Access VPN. Ironwatch recommends IKEv1 deprecation, hotfix verification, and forensic hunt for ELF payload staging under BOD 26-04 triage protocol.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — Ivanti Sentry CVE-2026-10520
ragChunks.text: Ironintel OSINT 2026-06-16: CVE-2026-10520 (CVSS 10.0) Ivanti Sentry unauthenticated OS command injection added to KEV June 11; Shadowserver confirmed exploitation within 40 hours of PoC. First BOD 26-04 three-day mandate with June 14 FCEB deadline. Healthcare and Public Sector profiles must verify Sentry exposure and execute forensic triage before patch.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — Oracle PeopleSoft Zero-Day
ragChunks.text: Ironintel OSINT 2026-06-16: ShinyHunters UNC6240 exploited CVE-2026-35273 (CVSS 9.8) on PeopleSoft Environment Management Hub May 27 through June 9 as zero-day; KEV entry June 12. Google GTIG notified 100 plus orgs, 68 percent higher-education. Public Sector and Technology Industry Profiles should elevate PSEMHUB exposure and vendor RMM allowlisting.

Ironintel policy monitor 2026-06-16: CMMC Phase 2 begins November 10, 2026 — mandatory Level 2 C3PAO certification; self-attestation insufficient for most CUI contracts. Assessments remain on NIST SP 800-171 Revision 2 per DoD class deviation 2024-O0013. Rev 3 ODP values published April 2025 signal H2 2027 earliest transition. C3PAO lead times 4 to 10 weeks — engage assessor immediately.

All June 16 live OSINT bytes passed Agent 14 Irongate DMZ sanitization (script-strip, BIGINT-cent validation) before CRM persistence. Strategic Intel dashboard refresh binds to manifest ironintel-osint-2026-06-16-live.

Ironwatch OSINT 2026-06-16: Symantec/Carbon Black disclose DragonForce Backdoor.Turn — first in-the-wild malware abusing Microsoft Teams TURN relay for QUIC C2 via anonymous visitor tokens. Defenders see only legitimate Teams egress. Technology and Finance Industry Profiles must extend continuous-audit from domain allowlists to Teams session and relay anomaly detection.

ragChunks.section: Active Threat Vector — Cisco SD-WAN KEV Cluster
ragChunks.text: Ironintel OSINT 2026-06-16: CISA KEV June 9 added CVE-2026-20245 (SD-WAN Manager command execution) and CVE-2026-20262 (path traversal to arbitrary file write); both actively exploited. Defense and Technology profiles must restrict SD-WAN management interfaces to trusted admin networks and apply BOD 26-04 tier-1 remediation.
